blocks.content: Gaold opened his eyes.
Dust floated in the sunlight streaming through the window.
Another new morning had arrived.
A morning that felt new every day.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: A morning that felt new every day.
Gaold got out of bed and washed himself.
The slender body reflected in the mirror was smooth, without a single scar.
By human standards, it wasn't particularly impressive, but he liked it.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: What importance did muscles have for someone who believed in God?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Do I believe in God?
A sudden question crossed his mind.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Come to think of it… why were there no scars?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: What?
Gaold tilted his head in confusion and splashed water on his body.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: His thoughts drifted away without settling on anything, and before he knew it, he was getting dressed, ready to greet the refreshing morning.
Just as he realized that only one thought wasn't drifting away, the door opened, and Miro entered.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: Hey! How can you still be sleeping? Today is the day of the combat evaluation!
Gaold hurriedly turned his body to hide his bare skin.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: Whoa! This is the men's dormitory!

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: Why so shy? We've already seen everything.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Huh? Seen everything?

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: Why are you acting like this all of a sudden? We were together last night too.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Were we?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: He couldn't remember at all.
Come to think of it, it felt like he couldn't remember anything.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: You're so coy. I can't believe I'm dating such a softie…

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: With that, Miro playfully smiled and lunged at Gaold.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Hey, wait!
Before Gaold could say anything, she kissed him, pulling him onto the bed.
As they sank into the bed together, Gaold heard a beautiful song.
Miro's breath tickled his neck, and her hand slipped inside his half-buttoned shirt, caressing his skin.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: We have about… 10 minutes left.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: He heard his heart pounding.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It was the shock of his heart beating for the first time after being still for a while.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It hurts.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Only after regaining his senses did he realize he hadn't felt anything until now.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It hurts.
His nerves became sensitive, and the pain of simply being alive surged through his entire body.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Ugh!
All he felt was pain, and Gaold gritted his teeth.
Miro was no longer there.
From the chest she had touched, thin, delicate black smoke was rising.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I just wanted to be happy.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Sob!

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Not power, not fame, not material things, just the small happiness that anyone could have, that's all I longed for.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Ugh!
As his heart raced, the black smoke rose even more, filling the ceiling.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: His heart.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Gaold's heart, which had denied the entire world, looked down with grotesque eyes and a twisted mouth.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: The only thing you wanted! The world took even that away from you! You have nothing left! She's there! Miro is there!

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Sob!
Gaold's eyes, which had been showing only the whites, returned to normal.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: In the pain amplified 2 million times, his briefly lost consciousness returned to reality, and the delusion that hadn't existed sank into his black heart, becoming fuel that burned and spun madly again.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Aaaah!
What Gaold saw was neither giants nor fallen angels, but just blood and flesh, and the shattered scenery.
Even in his unconscious state, he fought.
He had become a creature that existed only to advance, and nothing could change his momentum now.

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: Stop him! If he breaks through here, it's dangerous!
The giants, given special orders, ignored everyone else and charged at Gaold.
Hundreds of giants converged on Gaold in a triangular formation, but they were grotesquely scattered the moment they collided with him.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Pain sensitivity increased by 4 million times.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Aaaah!
Even as he felt transcendent pain, Gaold crushed them.
In a situation where it was impossible to distinguish between friend and foe, nothing could remain standing on the ground.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It was as if he had fallen into a vat of pain, the agony gnawing at his entire body and burrowing into his brain, delivering a burning discomfort.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Pain was just pain.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: No matter how painful, it was just a signal sent by the brain.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Compared to 'not being able to meet Miro'…

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It's nothing!
All the enemies within 100 meters ahead were crushed as if rolled over by an invisible force.
The blood, turned to dust, sprayed into the air, filling it.
In the distance, he saw the exit of the capital. He was more than halfway there.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Let's go! Faster!
Gaold shouted, holding onto his consciousness that was about to fly away again.
His eyes were already half white.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Sob! Damn it…!
Kangnan bit her lip, holding back a sob.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It must hurt. No, it's beyond just hurting.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: If this continued, Gaold would break.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Wait! Let's regroup here first…!

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: Don't stop Gaold.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: Don't stop him? If he goes any further, it's really over.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: I know. But if he stops, it's over right there.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: What do you mean…?

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: His stride is faltering. His mind is wavering. He's feeling his limits. If his momentum breaks even once…

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: He'll never get up again.
Kariel said with a smirk.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: It's over.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Everyone was stuck at the exact point where the Path of Desire ended.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: It must be quite miserable. At times like this, shouldn't you at least pretend to be sad?
Miro still didn't respond.
Boom.
At that moment, a distant rumble was heard.
Boom.
As the ground shook rhythmically, Kariel's gaze turned to Gaold.
And without a word, his mouth slowly opened.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Ugh!
Gaold used all his strength to lift his body.
The heart had no physical form, so it had no limits, and the faint smoke bypassed all control and sprouted again.
The sprout grew into a thick stem, branching out into many more, providing Gaold's heart with immense fuel.
Boom!
Due to the nature of the magic that suppressed targets by scale, Tiara in the sky shrank every time Gaold moved.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Ugh!
Gaold grimaced and poured his strength into his body.
Though it was still just a black speck, Miro was there, beyond the distant wall.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I'm coming.
As Gaold took a difficult step forward, Sein couldn't hold back his tears any longer.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: 'Yes. You're going, Gaold.'

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: Miro was there.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: 'Now, even I can see Miro.'
As Tiara's dominion weakened, Sein barely managed to stand.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: 'To be honest, Gaold, what you're doing isn't love or anything. But that's why I placed my hopes on you.'

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: A love so pure it was almost grotesque.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: 'If it's an equivalent exchange of pain and desire, you have every right to desire. No one can blame you. So go.'
Sein's Iron Wheel Eye spun at a terrifying speed, creating two massive halos in reality.
Clang, clang, clang, clang!
As the Law of Dominion was ground down by the gears, Tiara in the sky screamed.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: Go!
Gaold's body shot forward like an arrow again.
The immense heart that had risen from his chest enveloped him.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I am your heart, your desire. Go, Gaold!

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Raaaah!
Gaold roared like a demon as he charged.
Every nerve twitched, blood tears flowed from his eyes, and his blood-soaked tongue hung down to his chin.
The distance to Miro was now 10 kilometers.

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: Lord Surt! They've exited the Path of Desire! They're about to enter the drawbridge!

blocks.speaker: Surt
blocks.content: I know! Prepare for full-scale assault!
All of Surt's elite troops descended to block the drawbridge.
As Gaold's form became clearer, Miro slowly stood up.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: 'He's really… coming?'
